message:
bd-3oc9: unit tests for crypto_shim.rs hash/HMAC/random ops

28 tests covering hex_lower, hex_decode, encode_output, random_bytes,
SHA-256/SHA-512/SHA-1/MD5 known-answer tests, HMAC-SHA256/HMAC-SHA1,
UUID v4 format+uniqueness, timing-safe equal, and NODE_CRYPTO_JS constant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
